best_individual: add(sub(if_then_else(is_water, steepness, steepness), if_then_else(is_water, distance, steepness)), neg(step_penalty_multiplier(distance, 0.915, 0.714)))

hall_of_fame.individual: add(sub(if_then_else(is_water, steepness, steepness), if_then_else(is_water, distance, steepness)), neg(step_penalty_multiplier(distance, 0.915, 0.714)))
